French President Emmanuel Macron says France would never take part in operations to unblock the Strait of Hormuz: "We are not party to the conflict and therefore France will never take part in operations to open or liberate the Strait of Hormuz in the current context”
NEWS: Trump says no NATO countries want to help him with his war and that he doesn’t need or want their help anyway
Wow. Tulsi Gabbard deputy resigns to protest Trump’s Iran War.
Governor Newsom responds to Trump’s attacks on people with learning disabilities:

There's a glitch on Apple Podcasts affecting the delivery our our podcasts to a large amount of people. You can try to unfollow and refollow and see if you see the episodes — or listen on any other podcast platform, like Spotify, and you will see the new ones. This will hopefully be resolved soon!
THE MEIDASTOUCH PODCAST has just won BEST NEWS PODCAST at the 2026 iHeart Podcast Awards🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
Good for you guys keep up the great work.

Congratulations to MEIDASTOUCH ( @meidastouch.com ) for winning the BEST NEWS PODCAST at the iHeart Podcast Awards❗️🥇🏆

Ben Meiselas on The MeidasTouch Podcast winning the iHeartPodcast Award:

“When we see injustice, we call it out with moral clarity. We’re not afraid to call out fascism when we see it. When we see ICE and Border Patrol on our streets killing our people, we call it out.“
BREAKING: MeidasTouch wins BEST NEWS PODCAST at the iHeart Podcast Awards!!!

This recognition means a lot because it reflects the incredible community and partners who believe in independent media and the work we’re doing every day.

Thank you to everyone who supports MeidasTouch and helps make moments like this possible. We’re just getting started. 🎙️🏆
